query:
SELECT 'categorias' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = 1560157
UNION ALL
SELECT 'produtos' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 1560157
UNION ALL
SELECT 'com_foto' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 1560157 AND images IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sem_foto' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 1560157 AND images IS NULL;
